title: Unobramium ore
description:
Mod that adds new ore to minecraft
for people who likes more vanilla mods
body:
Hello!  
This mod adds new ore: "Unobramium"  
This mod has: tools,New Crafting tools system,Tools,Toolsmith villager trade.  

---------------------Spawn------------------------------  
This ore is rare and better than netherite  
Unobramium ore spawns at overworld  
min height (-64)  
max height (16)  

--------------------------------Guide------------------------------  
1.0  
https://youtu.be/Q4N1yaJ6haE  
1.1  
https://youtu.be/aOl12_mNRJ4

---------------------Players----------------  
This mod is better for players,who not likes big vanilla changes.  
This is my first mod,i hope you will like it and i will update it.  
GoodLuck!
